name: Cone v. Bell
question:
1) Is Mr. Cone entitled to federal habeas review of his claim that the state suppressed material evidence in violation of Brady v. Maryland?

2) Is Mr. Cone's federal habeas corpus claim "procedurally defaulted" because it has been presented twice at the state court level?
description: A case in which the Court found that the petitioner was entitled to federal habeas corpus review due to suppression of material evidence, notwithstanding that habeas reviewed had already been presented twice at the state court level.
